changes_made.description: Renamed terse variable 'ts' to 'lastServerResponseTs' for consistency with current-output/route.ts naming convention

no_changes_needed: src/lib/auto-yes-poller.ts - Idempotency logic is clean: early return with 'already_running' reason is clear and minimal
src/components/worktree/WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx - New state and useAutoYes integration follows existing patterns
src/app/api/worktrees/[id]/current-output/route.ts - Timestamp conversion and passing is straightforward
tests/unit/lib/auto-yes-manager.test.ts - Idempotency tests are well-structured with clear assertions
tests/unit/lib/worktree-status-helper.test.ts - Tests cover key scenarios: timestamp present, null, and no session
